screens.purpose: Illustrated hub screen with gate guard, contract board, blacksmith, healer, council scribe, Dragon memorial, and map gate.
Main navigation for current quest objectives, rewards, linked locations, and completed steps.
Small early gear screen for sword, armor, and stat changes used by gate onboarding.
Visual Ash Border region map with unlocked/fogged locations, shaped region boundaries, roads, active quest highlight, local contents, and threat labels.
Illustrated first contract location with encounters, grain recovery, and basement clue progression.
Separate combat screen for pure autobattle: player/enemy HP, damage events, result, and rewards.
Investigation journal for Dragon-related clues, Black Sun evidence, and next lead.
Basic settings panel retained as support UI, not part of the first narrative loop.
